    pixels_out[idx * 3 + 1] = (unsigned short)(__float2uint_rn(fminf(fmaxf(g_out, 0.0f), 1.0f) * 65535.0f));

    Ptx::from_src(COMBINED_LUT_PTX),
    "combined_lut",
